ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_species" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant species */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, collaborator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborators" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasources" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "datasource_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "environmental_metric_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the environmental metrics table */,
  "datasource_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the datasources table */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "environmental_metric_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the environmental metrics table */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
